steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The word However introduces a contrast, pointing out that the 2016 study’s small sample size undermines its conclusion.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Choice B captures this idea by saying the passage notes a potential concern about the study’s findings. The other three either add unrelated topics, invent a debate, or describe behavioral changes over time, which the passage does not do. That matches choice B — B is correct.
